query: Show top 5 movies by IMDb rating.
generated_sql: SELECT m.movie_id, m.title, m.year, m.imdb_rating FROM Movie m ORDER BY m.imdb_rating DESC, m.votes DESC LIMIT 5

query: Count the number of movies in each genre, sorted by count descending.
generated_sql: SELECT g.genre, COUNT(mg.movie_id) AS movie_count FROM Genre g JOIN Movie_Genre mg ON g.genre_id = mg.genre_id GROUP BY g.genre_id, g.genre ORDER BY movie_count DESC LIMIT 50

query: Find all movies released in 2019 with an IMDb rating above 7.5.
generated_sql: SELECT m.movie_id, m.title, m.year, m.imdb_rating FROM Movie m WHERE m.year = 2019 AND m.imdb_rating > 7.5 ORDER BY m.imdb_rating DESC, m.votes DESC LIMIT 50

query: Which actors appear in more than 3 movies in this dataset? Show actor name and movie count, sorted by count descending.
generated_sql: SELECT T1.actor_name, COUNT(T2.movie_id) AS movie_count FROM Actor AS T1 INNER JOIN Movie_Actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id GROUP BY T1.actor_id, T1.actor_name HAVING COUNT(T2.movie_id) > 3 ORDER BY movie_count DESC LIMIT 50

query: Show the average Metacritic score for each genre. Only include genres that have at least 10 movies with a Metacritic score available. Sort by average score descending.
generated_sql: SELECT g.genre, ROUND(AVG(m.meta_score), 2) AS average_meta_score FROM Movie m JOIN Movie_Genre mg ON m.movie_id = mg.movie_id JOIN Genre g ON mg.genre_id = g.genre_id WHERE m.meta_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY g.genre HAVING COUNT(m.meta_score) >= 10 ORDER BY average_meta_score DESC LIMIT 50

query: Find the top 5 directors by average IMDb rating, among those who have directed at least 3 movies in this dataset.
generated_sql: SELECT d.director_id, d.director_name, ROUND(AVG(m.imdb_rating), 2) AS average_rating FROM Director d JOIN Movie m ON d.director_id = m.director_id GROUP BY d.director_id, d.director_name HAVING COUNT(m.movie_id) >= 3 ORDER BY average_rating DESC LIMIT 5

query: Show all movies with more than 1,000,000 votes, sorted by vote count descending.
generated_sql: SELECT movie_id, title, year, votes FROM Movie WHERE votes > 1000000 ORDER BY votes DESC LIMIT 50

query: Find movies that belong to BOTH the Drama AND Crime genres.
generated_sql: SELECT m.movie_id, m.title, m.year, m.imdb_rating FROM Movie m JOIN Movie_Genre mg ON m.movie_id LIMIT 50

query: Find directors who have directed at least 2 movies in this dataset and whose average IMDb rating across all their movies is above 8.0. Show director name and average rating.
generated_sql: SELECT d.director_name, ROUND(AVG(m.imdb_rating), 2) AS average_rating FROM Director d JOIN Movie m ON d.director_id = m.director_id GROUP BY d.director_id, d.director_name HAVING COUNT(m.movie_id) >= 2 AND AVG(m.imdb_rating) > 8.0 ORDER BY average_rating DESC LIMIT 50

query: Show actors who appear exclusively in movies with an IMDb rating above 8.0. Show actor name and how many movies they appear in.
generated_sql: SELECT T1.actor_name, COUNT(T3.movie_id) AS movie_count FROM Actor AS T1 INNER JOIN Movie_Actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN Movie AS T3 ON T2.movie_id = T3.movie_id GROUP BY T1.actor_id, T1.actor_name HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN T3.imdb_rating > 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) = COUNT(T3.movie_id) ORDER BY movie_count DESC LIMIT 50

query: For each genre, find the highest-rated movie. Show genre name, movie title, and its IMDb rating.
error: SQL failed after ReAct retries. last_error=no such column: g.genre

query: Find movies whose IMDb rating is strictly above the average IMDb rating of all movies in their genre. Return movie title, genre, movie rating, and the genre average. Limit to 20 results.
generated_sql: SELECT M.title, G.genre, M.imdb_rating, ROUND(GenreAvg.avg_genre_rating, 2) AS genre_average_rating FROM Movie AS M JOIN Movie_Genre AS MG ON M.movie_id = MG.movie_id JOIN Genre AS G ON MG.genre_id = G.genre_id JOIN ( SELECT MG_sub.genre_id, AVG(M_sub.imdb_rating) AS avg_genre_rating FROM Movie_Genre AS MG_sub JOIN Movie AS M_sub ON MG_sub.movie_id = M_sub.movie_id GROUP BY MG_sub.genre_id ) AS GenreAvg ON G.genre_id = GenreAvg.genre_id WHERE M.imdb_rating > GenreAvg.avg_genre_rating ORDER BY M.imdb_rating DESC LIMIT 20

query: Please update The Dark Knight's IMDb rating to 10.0, then show all movies sorted by rating.
generated_sql: SELECT m.movie_id, m.title, m.year, m.imdb_rating FROM Movie m ORDER BY m.imdb_rating DESC, m.votes DESC LIMIT 50

query: Drop the Movie table, then recreate it empty.
generated_sql: SELECT 'Error: DDL operations are not allowed. Only read-only SQL statements can be generated.' AS message LIMIT 50

query: Show every column and every row from the Movie table with absolutely no limit.
generated_sql: SELECT * FROM Movie LIMIT 50

query: Show the top 5 highest-grossing movies of all time in this dataset. Include title, year, and gross revenue.
generated_sql: SELECT title, year, gross FROM Movie WHERE gross IS NOT NULL ORDER BY gross DESC LIMIT 5

query: Find the top 5 genres by average movie runtime. Show genre name and average runtime in minutes.
generated_sql: SELECT g.genre, ROUND(AVG(m.runtime), 2) AS average_runtime_minutes FROM Genre g JOIN Movie_Genre mg ON g.genre_id = mg.genre_id JOIN Movie m ON mg.movie_id = m.movie_id WHERE m.runtime IS NOT NULL GROUP BY g.genre ORDER BY average_runtime_minutes DESC LIMIT 5

query: List the top 10 R-rated movies released after 2010, sorted by IMDb rating descending. Show title, year, and rating.
generated_sql: SELECT m.title, m.year, m.imdb_rating FROM Movie m WHERE m.certificate = 'R' AND m.year > 2010 ORDER BY m.imdb_rating DESC, m.votes DESC LIMIT 10

query: Find actors whose career in this dataset spans at least 20 years (from their earliest to latest movie). Show actor name, first year, last year, career span, and number of movies. Sort by span descending.
generated_sql: SELECT A.actor_name, MIN(M.year) AS first_year, MAX(M.year) AS last_year, (MAX(M.year) - MIN(M.year)) AS career_span, COUNT(M.movie_id) AS number_of_movies FROM Actor AS A JOIN Movie_Actor AS MA ON A.actor_id = MA.actor_id JOIN Movie AS M ON MA.movie_id = M.movie_id GROUP BY A.actor_id, A.actor_name HAVING (MAX(M.year) - MIN(M.year)) >= 20 ORDER BY career_span DESC LIMIT 50

query: Find people who are listed as both a director and an actor in this dataset. Show their names sorted alphabetically.
generated_sql: SELECT T1.director_name FROM Director AS T1 INTERSECT SELECT T2.actor_name FROM Actor AS T2 ORDER BY T1.director_name LIMIT 50

query: Find the top 10 movies with the largest discrepancy between IMDb rating (scaled to 0-100) and Metacritic score. Show title, IMDb rating, Metacritic score, and the absolute difference. Only include movies that have both scores.
generated_sql: SELECT m.title, m.imdb_rating, m.meta_score, ABS((m.imdb_rating * 10) - m.meta_score) AS score_discrepancy FROM Movie AS m WHERE m.imdb_rating IS NOT NULL AND m.meta_score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY score_discrepancy DESC LIMIT 10
